name: Chez Melange Gazpacho
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Red bell pepper, seeded and diced
1/2 Yellow bell pepper, seeded and diced
1/2 Green bell pepper, seeded and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all of the ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Mix them together well to ensure even distribution of flavors and textures.
3. Transfer the mixture to a container and refrigerate until chilled.
